positive: A central, stylized portrait illustration featuring a majestic golden retriever dog head and an ethereal, luminous crescent moon. The dog is rendered in a sophisticated, clean line art style with solid, contrasting patches of color, suggesting a mix of photorealism and geometric simplification. The moon should be depicted with delicate, glowing line details, accented by constellations of minimalist abstract geometric shapes (stars, circles, triangles). The composition must be symmetrical and highly graphic, emphasizing strong silhouettes and negative space. Use a limited color palette: deep midnight blues, vibrant golds, creamy whites, and soft blacks. The overall aesthetic should be vintage celestial folk art meets modern kawaii simplification. Full-body view should be restricted to the heads and surrounding celestial elements for optimal t-shirt printing. Studio lighting, ultra-high detail, clean edges, high contrast, vector art look, minimalist tattoo style.
negative: blur, grain, text, logo, watermark, signature, ugly, poorly drawn, distorted, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast, gradient, realistic photo, photorealism
